'''βàög-ng-t-w''' ('''kagangtewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jerrycummumble|jerrycummumble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ng-t-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jerrycummumble|jerrycummumble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàög-ng-t-w
|-
! Lemma
| kagangtewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigangtewoko|thigangtewoko]] || [[word:jigangtewoko|jigangtewoko]] || [[word:shigangtewoko|shigangtewoko]] || [[word:kigangtewoko|kigangtewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugangtewoko|thuthugangtewoko]] || [[word:jujugangtewoko|jujugangtewoko]] || [[word:shushugangtewoko|shushugangtewoko]] || [[word:kukugangtewoko|kukugangtewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugangtewoko|thugangtewoko]] || [[word:jugangtewoko|jugangtewoko]] || [[word:shugangtewoko|shugangtewoko]] || [[word:kugangtewoko|kugangtewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugangtewoko|thugangtewoko]] || [[word:jugangtewoko|jugangtewoko]] || [[word:shugangtewoko|shugangtewoko]] || [[word:kugangtewoko|kugangtewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegangtewoko|thegangtewoko]] || [[word:jegangtewoko|jegangtewoko]] || [[word:shegangtewoko|shegangtewoko]] || [[word:kegangtewoko|kegangtewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogangtewoko|thothogangtewoko]] || [[word:jojogangtewoko|jojogangtewoko]] || [[word:shoshogangtewoko|shoshogangtewoko]] || [[word:kokogangtewoko|kokogangtewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogangtewoko|thogangtewoko]] || [[word:jogangtewoko|jogangtewoko]] || [[word:shogangtewoko|shogangtewoko]] || [[word:kogangtewoko|kogangtewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogangtewoko|thogangtewoko]] || [[word:jogangtewoko|jogangtewoko]] || [[word:shogangtewoko|shogangtewoko]] || [[word:kogangtewoko|kogangtewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠgangtewoko|thΟΠgangtewoko]] || [[word:jΟΠgangtewoko|jΟΠgangtewoko]] || [[word:shΟΠgangtewoko|shΟΠgangtewoko]] || [[word:kΟΠgangtewoko|kΟΠgangtewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagangtewoko|thathagangtewoko]] || [[word:jajagangtewoko|jajagangtewoko]] || [[word:shashagangtewoko|shashagangtewoko]] || [[word:kakagangtewoko|kakagangtewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagangtewoko|thagangtewoko]] || [[word:jagangtewoko|jagangtewoko]] || [[word:shagangtewoko|shagangtewoko]] || [[word:kagangtewoko|kagangtewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagangtewoko|thagangtewoko]] || [[word:jagangtewoko|jagangtewoko]] || [[word:shagangtewoko|shagangtewoko]] || [[word:kagangtewoko|kagangtewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
